name: Water Parks & Resorts
description: High-wear rental tubes, life vests, locker wristbands, and repair materials designed to withstand chlorine, UV, and high-frequency guest throughput.

name: Swimming Academies & Clubs
description: Professional training kickboards, pull buoys, short-blade fins, and customized swim caps designed for intense training regimens.

name: Schools & Universities
description: Cost-effective, durable bulk swim gear, training aids, and pool lane ropes meeting competitive educational safety and sport regulations.

name: Hotels & Hospitality
description: Elegant pool ladders, lounge tubes, gift-shop retail phone cases, and guest safety vests that elevate the resort experience.

name: Dealers & Distributors
description: Scalable factory-direct supplies with customizable branding, protective packaging, compliance certificates, and reliable logistics support.

name: Government & Public Pools
description: High-durability public pool equipment, lane separators, safety buoys, and heavy-duty robotic vacuums meeting civil contract requirements.
